zh.lifeSummary: 當Jasper Bradford於1443年出生在英國諾圖波藍德布拉德福德 (亞爾 莫普)時，他的父親Robert Bradford27歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Southworth28歲。他於1459年與Margaret Ogle在英國英格蘭越可爾阿可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1535年在他的家鄉享年92歲，埋葬在英國越可爾本特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jasper Bradford于1443年出生在英国諾圖波藍德布拉德福德 (亞爾 莫普)时，他的父亲Robert Bradford27岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Southworth28岁。他于1459年与Margaret Ogle在英国英格兰越可爾阿可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1535年在他的家乡享年92岁，埋葬在英国越可爾本特利。

nameMeanings.name: Bradford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places, large and small, called Bradford; in particular the city in Yorkshire, which originally rose to prosperity as a wool town. There are others in Derbyshire, Devon, Dorset, Greater Manchester, Norfolk, Somerset, Cheshire, Wiltshire and elsewhere. They are all named with Old English brād ‘broad’ + ford ‘ford’.

History: This name was brought independently to North American by many different bearers from the 17th century onward. William Bradford (1590–1657), born in Austerfield in South Yorkshire, England, the son of a yeoman farmer, was among the Pilgrim Fathers who emigrated to North America on the Mayflower in 1620. He was a signer of the Mayflower Compact and in 1621 he was elected governor of Plymouth colony, being re-elected thirty times. Another William Bradford (1663–1752), printer, came from Barnwell, Leicestershire, England, to Philadelphia, PA, in 1685, subsequently moving to New York, where he set up a printing press and founded a paper mill. His grandson, also called William Bradford (1721–91), was known as ‘the patriot printer’, famous for his Philadelphia newspaper, which among other things denounced the Stamp Act, "which no American can mention without abhorrence".

variants.name: Braford
meanings: English: variant of   Bradford  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Brafford
meanings: English: variant of   Bradford  . This surname has now died out in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Jasper
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English form of the name assigned in Christian folklore to one of the three Magi or ‘wise men’, who brought gifts to the infant Christ at his birth (Matthew 2:1). The name does not appear in the Bible, and is first found in medieval tradition. It seems to be ultimately of Persian origin, from a word meaning ‘treasurer’. There is probably no connection with the English vocabulary word jasper denoting a gemstone, which is of Semitic origin. The name was introduced into England from the Low Countries in the Middle Ages and, although it never became popular, continued to be widely used in parts of the north. Well-known bearers include British comedian Jasper Carrott ( b. 1945 as Robert Davies ) and the fashion designer Jasper Conran ( b. 1959 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Jasper Bradford was born in 1443, in Bradford (near Morpeth), Northumberland, England, his father, Robert Bradford, was 27 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Southworth, was 28. He married Margaret Ogle in 1459, in Arksey, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1535, in his hometown, at the age of 92, and was buried in Bentley, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jasper Bradford est né en 1443, à Bradford (near Morpeth), Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Robert Bradford, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Southworth, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Ogle en 1459, à Arksey, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1535, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 92 ans, et a été enterré à Bentley, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jasper Bradford 1443 in Bradford (near Morpeth), Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Bradford 27 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Southworth 28. Er hat 1459 in Arksey, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Ogle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1535 im Alter von 92 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bentley, Yorkshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Jasper Bradfordが1443年にイギリスノースウンバーランドブラドフォード (ネアル モーペス)で生まれた時，父Robert Bradfordは27歳，母Lady Elizabeth Southworthは28歳であった。1459年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアアルクシーでMargaret Ogleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1535年に故郷で92歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアベントリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jasper Bradford(이)가 1443년 영국 노르스벌랜드 브래드퍼드 (니아어 모르페스)에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Bradford(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Southworth(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 아크시에서 Margaret Ogle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1535년 그의 고향에서 92세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 벤틀리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jasper Bradford nasceu em 1443, em Bradford (near Morpeth), Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Bradford, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Southworth, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Ogle em 1459, em Arksey, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1535, em sua cidade natal, com 92 anos, e foi sepultado em Bentley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jasper Bradford родился в 1443 г. в местности брадфорд (нир морпет), нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Bradford было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Southworth, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Ogle в 1459 г. в местности аркси, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1535 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 92 лет и был похоронен в местности бентли, еркшир, Англия.
